name: Flagship Community
description_short: NCUA-insured federal credit union offering routing number information and banking services. Member of the national credit union system with NCUA ID 13391.
description_long: Flagship Community is a federal credit union insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), operating under NCUA charter ID 13391. The organization maintains an RSSD ID of 641382 and an EIN of 381648720, establishing it as a legitimate financial institution within the federally-regulated credit union system. The website primarily functions as a routing number directory and informational resource for customers seeking to identify their institution's routing codes for various banking transactions. Flagship Community Credit Union offers standard banking services accessible through its branch network, with at least one documented location in Clearwater, Florida (routing number 063115893). The institution provides essential banking transaction support including direct deposits, electronic payments, wire transfers, and check ordering services through its routing infrastructure. Flagship Community distinguishes itself as a federally-insured credit union rather than a commercial bank, which typically means member-ownership structure and potential member-focused benefits. However, the website content is primarily informational about routing numbers rather than a comprehensive service listing, limiting visibility into the full scope of products, interest rates, fees, membership requirements, or competitive advantages. The company appears to maintain a functional but basic web presence focused on routing number lookup rather than comprehensive digital banking or marketing materials.
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection for member deposits
Serves Clearwater, Florida with documented physical branch location
Supports multiple transaction types: direct deposits, ACH payments, wire transfers, check ordering
Legitimate federally-regulated credit union with official NCUA charter
Member of national credit union network with established RSSD and EIN credentials
cons: Website provides minimal information about products, services, rates, or membership benefits
No details on loan offerings, savings account types, or credit products
Limited branch information visible (only one Florida location documented)
No information about membership requirements or eligibility criteria
No pricing, APR, or fee information disclosed on available website content
best_for: Existing members seeking routing number information for transactions
Banking customers in Clearwater, Florida area with physical branch access
Those seeking NCUA-insured credit union membership with federal protections
diagnosis: Flagship Community Credit Union is best for existing members or Clearwater-area residents seeking a federally-insured credit union. The main caveat is that the website functions primarily as a routing number directory rather than a full-service banking portal, offering minimal transparency about actual products, rates, fees, or membership benefits.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
